project_name: OpenClaw SAI Dashboard (Alfred — The OpenClaw Administrator)

contract_sender.name: dezocode
contract_sender.role: Contract originator — primary Telegram session recipient for all Alfred run updates

fleet_coherence.description: Alfred + all subagents and dashboard-created OpenClaw agents follow identical ICM, Telegram session, and Slack mirror protocols; Alfred is the template agent

rules: No secret values in Git — env names and status only in auth-matrix.md
Dashboard /settings/secrets shows masked status only — no export
OpenClaw config mirror uses ${ENV_VAR} placeholders — config-expert rejects literals
Rotation requires dezocode/monaecode MCQ via Telegram + Slack CHANGE event
ICM runs and telegram-session.jsonl remain redacted per agent-report patterns

design_system.intent: One unified design language for entire dashboard: Cursor shell + Activity Monitor lists + Robinhood live metrics + Notion block UX; Chat tab immersive full-screen Habbo game; all live data VPS-hosted; Mac Tauri + SwiftUI iOS parity

notebooklm_source.title: Beyond the Chatbox: 6 Surprising Lessons from Building a Self-Hosted AI Space Lobster
notebooklm_source.note: Owner-provided research notebook; Alfred must ingest exported sources into second-brain after auth

ceo.name: Sai
ceo.gate: VERIFY PASS on ICM + registry + dashboard integration plan

cto.name: Saul
cto.gate: CTO review on architecture, VPS security, CI wiring

organization_onboarding_gate.description: Hard must-complete criteria for Alfred to join SAI organization (dezocode PR #45 review 4751008157)
criteria: primary_runtime is openclaw-gateway-vps — Alfred is NOT a Cursor runtime agent
100% production completion: dashboard + OpenClaw CLI host dependencies + auth regulation on VPS
Host admin dashboard CLI live-feeds all monitoring/reporting tabs
Live data latency: p99 <= 15ms from host CLI event to dashboard tab render
All ICM verifiers PASS: verify-semantic-hierarchy, verify-agent-setup, verify-agent-audit, verify-merge-handoff
Sai [SAI][VERIFY] PASS + Saul CTO review + both co-founders authorize merge to main

fulfillment_gate.description: Alfred gains final organization approval only when all are true
conditions: All A0–A13 deliverables evidenced on bootstrap branch with ICM run artifacts
OpenClaw Gateway healthy on Hostinger VPS with documented health checks
Host admin CLI live-feeds dashboard tabs with p99 latency <= 15ms (organization_onboarding_gate)
100% production smoke: zero blocking errors on Mac desktop + iPhone Whisper approved flows
Composio auth flows for Telegram, Google Drive, and Gemini Notebook reachable from dashboard auth hub
Every registered SAI agent has verified Telegram inbox path documented (or honest BLOCKED with remediation plan)
Every OpenClaw subagent (Alfred- or dashboard-created) passes three-connection gate: Telegram inbox, Slack intro with DM link, Habbo presence in rolodex
Every session run: Telegram updates to contract sender (dezocode) for INTAKE/PLAN/CHANGE/VERIFY/BLOCKED/HANDOFF within 60s; Slack mirror to #agentupdates
Fleet coherence proof gate PASS — all fleet agents inherit Alfred Telegram+ICM+Slack protocols
Secrets compliance PASS — VPS /etc/openclaw/sai.env provisioned; auth-matrix connected statuses; no values in Git
Sai posts [SAI][VERIFY] PASS referencing this contract_id
Saul posts acceptable CTO review (no blocking P1 on security/VPS/auth)
Both co-founders explicitly authorize merge to Dezocode/Sai:main
Until gate complete: work ONLY on proj/openclaw-dashboard/* branches — no direct main edits

deliverables.title: Fresh OpenClaw install + Hostinger VPS Gateway
deliverables.description: npm install -g openclaw@latest; openclaw onboard --install-daemon; gateway on VPS; health endpoint; dependency verification script

deliverables.title: SAI ICM integration + agent reporting SOP
deliverables.description: Registry sync, [SAI][EVENT] template enforcement, public Slack channel routing, session run SOP for all agents

deliverables.title: Composio: Telegram, Gemini Notebook, Google Drive
deliverables.description: Composio MCP/tool-router on VPS; OAuth flows surfaced in dashboard auth hub; no secrets in repo

deliverables.title: Live activity tracking (stock-market meter)
deliverables.description: Millisecond-resolution ingest from Slack, GitHub (both repos), agent registry, automations; live graph UI

deliverables.title: Second brain — Obsidian-class vault + graph
deliverables.description: Editable/searchable files; backlinks; hierarchy + vector graph; GitHub OAuth for human users

deliverables.title: Research tab + second-brain MCP gateway
deliverables.description: Research agent sessions; source compilation; verified improvements pipeline into vault; MCP server for all SAI agents

deliverables.title: Habbo-style 2D agent chat room + Telegram PM
deliverables.description: 2D avatars per registered agent; walk-up chat; private rooms → Telegram via OpenClaw messaging

deliverables.title: OpenClaw config mirror + config expert subagent
deliverables.description: Dashboard mirror of ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json; config-expert on agent team; model configuration UI

deliverables.title: GitHub branch + CI status dashboard
deliverables.description: Live branch tracking for Dezocode/Sai and monaecode/Sai; CI status; failure rate metrics per project

deliverables.title: Mac desktop app + iPhone Whisper companion
deliverables.description: Native Mac client; Whisper Flow iPhone app; VPS command execution; browser MCP bridge to desktop

deliverables.title: Telegram inbox verification for all agents
deliverables.description: Register and verify Telegram inbox for present and future registry agents; block activation without verification or BLOCKED record

deliverables.title: Dashboard auth hub (100% reachable flows)
deliverables.description: GitHub account linking; Composio and native OAuth; permission handling; live browser MCP for auth completion

deliverables.title: Telegram native session bot + fleet coherence proof gate
deliverables.description: Alfred as Telegram session bot: message contract sender every run update; maintain VPS session memory; fleet agents inherit same ICM+Telegram+Slack coherence; proof gate before onboarding

deliverables.title: Review package for Sai + Saul + co-founders
deliverables.description: ICM handoff; demo recordings; verify-agent-setup PASS on PR branch; PR to main only after human gate

acceptance_criteria: All A0–A13 deliverables exist on bootstrap branch with ICM run artifacts
first-message-to-openclaw.md executed as binding opening session
research-integration-methods.md cited in every deliverable README
OpenClaw Gateway + dashboard health checks pass on Hostinger VPS
No secrets in Git; VPS secret store per secrets-security.md; auth-matrix status-only
secrets-compliance.sh PASS on bootstrap branch
Agent activity SOP posts to approved public Slack channels per reporting.yaml
OpenClaw-primary runtime scaffold present (runtimes/openclaw/gateway/) — not Cursor-primary
Unified design language v2 — Cursor + Activity Monitor + Robinhood; one token source; 28px controls; CursorSelect on all dropdowns; design-compliance.sh PASS
Chat tab immersive-game mode — full-screen Habbo viewport on Mac and iOS; HUD uses dashboard tokens only
All live metrics/graphs/rolodex activity age sourced from VPS WebSockets — no fake production data
Native Mac Tauri + iOS SwiftUI with WhisperFlow in and responsive TTS out
Sign in with Apple + GitHub + Composio auth reachable from auth hub
Habbo room generator operational in chat tab (Phaser desktop / SpriteKit or WebView iOS)
Shared research workspaces for dezocode and monaecode GitHub-authed users
Telegram MCQ smoke PASS for dezocode approval path
Gateway binds loopback (127.0.0.1) by default; remote exposure documented per gateway-exposure-policy.md
verify-agent-telegram.sh fail-closed per agent; subagent-connection-gate.sh delegates (no stub PASS)
Every subagent (Alfred- or user-created): Telegram inbox + Slack intro with DM link + Habbo avatar (three-connection gate)
Alfred messages contract sender (dezocode) on Telegram for every session run stage; session memory persisted on VPS; Slack mirror within 60s
Fleet coherence proof gate PASS — config-expert and research-coordinator inherit Alfred telegram/ICM/Slack protocols
Agent Rolodex lists all agents with activity age; friends + personal rooms; Cursor-identical typography on Mac and iOS
Host CLI ingest p99 <= 15ms evidenced (openclaw-dashboard/scripts/verify-ingest-latency.sh)
100% production smoke flows pass — zero blocking errors
All scripts/verify-* ICM gates PASS on PR branch
scripts/agent-contract-pr-review PASS on every PR
Work isolated to proj/openclaw-dashboard/* until fulfillment_gate complete
Every commit: Task-ID, Agent: Alfred, Report-Event trailers
